description:
Specification for a plot (artist) to show on a matplotlib Axes.

When evaluating expressions, the BenchmarkRunReport will be available as the `report` symbol.

monitoring.benchmarker.configurations.artifacts.matplotlib_figure.XYPlotSpecification, as defined in monitoring/benchmarker/configurations/artifacts/matplotlib_figure.py

$ref.description: Path to content that replaces the $ref

evaluation_context.description: Symbols available to other expressions in this plot specification.

label_expr.description: Expression for the label of this plot/artist (string), primarily used in the plot legend.

render_expr.description: If specified, whether this plot should be rendered (boolean).  Default true.

x_data_expr.description:
List of X data values for XY points.

Must have the same number of entries as y_data.
Defaults to 1, 2, 3, ..., N for N y_data values.

y_data_expr.description: List of Y data values for XY points.
